input_text: The teacher showed a map to the students. Mary was heard to sing. Penguins live in the water. Cities in Estonia are estonian. A tall and quiet man entered. The cat sat on the mat and purred. "Riga is outside America. The car is red. Mr Dursley is a catholic. The brother of the friend of Eve arrived. The bike is small. Sandra travelled to the office. John is an elephant with a probability 10 percent. Mike or Mickey are not female. Unexpectedly, the door opened. The cake was eaten. The length of Nile is 80 kilometers. Sheep are afraid of mice. Is the bike red?
